entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop studied for yield estimation.

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of rice produced per unit area, the target of estimation.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: The use of satellite imagery and sensors to collect data on crops.

entities.name: CROP SIMULATION MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model used to simulate crop growth and yield.

entities.name: APSIM-ORYZA
entities.description: A specific crop simulation model used for rice yield prediction.

entities.name: NALGONDA DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Telangana where the study was conducted.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The Indian state where the study area is located.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: CROP YIELD FORECASTING
entities.description: The process of predicting future crop yields based on various data sources.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A dimensionless quantity that characterizes plant canopies, used for yield assessment.

entities.name: SENTINEL-1
entities.description: A satellite providing radar data for crop monitoring.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite providing multispectral data for crop monitoring.

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A machine learning classifier used for crop classification.

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud-based platform for geospatial analysis.

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index, a spectral index used to estimate vegetation health and LAI.

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season in India.

entities.name: CEPTOMETER
entities.description: An instrument used to measure the leaf area index in the field.

entities.name: CROP CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying different crop types from remote sensing data.
